description_long: This is a modern diesel locomotive painted in a striking black and orange livery with the 'Grand Central' branding and logo prominently displayed on the side. The locomotive features a streamlined, aerodynamic front with a large windshield and headlights, as well as visible buffer and coupling mechanisms. The roof is equipped with several ventilation grilles and exhaust outlets, indicating a powerful engine within. The sides are mostly solid with minimal windows, suggesting this is a locomotive unit rather than a passenger carriage. The undercarriage reveals detailed wheels, suspension, and other mechanical components. The overall design is robust and built for hauling passenger or express trains on mainline tracks.
description: A sleek black and orange Grand Central diesel locomotive with a streamlined front, minimal windows, and detailed mechanical features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the aerodynamic nose, large windshield, headlights, and buffer/coupling details.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the locomotive, Grand Central branding, ventilation grilles, and undercarriage details.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back face, rear lights, and end coupling mechanisms.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, with similar branding and mechanical features visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: minimal windows at front and sides
